metadata.description: A collection of writing and productivity skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: writewell
plugins.description: Writing pipeline that strips AI patterns, enforces language discipline, and applies your personal voice

plugins.name: keynote-writer
plugins.description: Turn a braindump or transcript into a TED-quality keynote outline with narrative flow, a one-sentence takeaway, and slide-by-slide speaker notes

plugins.name: deck-builder
plugins.description: Build single-file HTML slide decks in a typography-first design, and add a presenter-notes popup with timers and two-way navigation sync

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: Load project context at the start of a development session and update the docs before ending it
